title: Request to Join - not getting notification emails
excerpt:
I am not getting emails when someone “requests to join” a workspace or board. I am getting other notification emails on other changes. 
What am I missing?

posts.author: DrGerry (Gerald)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am not getting emails when someone “requests to join” a workspace or board. I am getting other notification emails on other changes.

What am I missing?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Gerald! That does sound odd. Are you the workspace and/or board owner when this is happening?

Send us a DM on social media or reach out to our support team here so we can take a look at what might be happening here!

posts.author: DrGerry (Gerald)
posts.cookedHtml: Well . . . in my Profile/Notifications I noticed that an email is only available for “requests to join a private Board/Dashboard”, there is no mention for requests to join a workspace.
